textByHashes.629d082896772fe4c620eeb8b5e9c2c9de010453: Greetings, or nilsal, as they say in these parts! Have you come to talk forestry?
textByHashes.0fc4e45a6fa9364f0c2b584e2852a1dbc973d333: Greetings! Have you come to talk forestry?
textByHashes.68ae56c385bc11d61ac0a31999113bf742ac4159: That's right! In this day and age, we need those trained in the way of the forester now more than ever!
textByHashes.05313757e1825950982a895672d9dc38416f7dfa: You know, helping the woodland flourish with your fellow foresters! And of course, drinking plenty of tea to fuel yourself while you do so!
textByHashes.d13fd90729ea702a3a188b16d3be616560b1b49a: Well, I'd recommend spending some more time in the forests before embarking on your forestry journey. Come back when you can fell a mighty oak!
textByHashes.45c7d60e929cb47493e122c1a936df3f8167925a: First, you'll need a forestry kit. Once you have one, all you need to do is chop some trees while you have it on you. The woodland will do the rest!
textByHashes.1dc624a051afea43b34e90a08692fabb35814627: Oh, and if you find any anima-infused bark while tending to the forests, I'll gladly trade with you. My shop has all sorts of useful items.
textByHashes.42b9598738cc9fbeeb821223d4c16787d1da56e4: It is, but I find it's better to let the forests do the talking. You'll understand once you get going. Speaking of which, would you like one of those kits now? I have them free of charge in my shop.
textByHashes.f5484e71945f58e98a32c3e64f2c19e357e3cf45: Hello again! How goes your forestry journey?
textByHashes.961e5350c086481acb46319ed44970d5e98e18c1: It's very simple. All you need is a forestry kit. I have them free of charge in my shop. Once you have one, just chop some trees while you have it on you. The woodland will do the rest!
textByHashes.c4f209966993ad25153d0a079b565cc0a944cb71: Speaking of which, would you like to trade now?
textByHashes.166350c70e7f57f8f6c11b1d373738cdcee1cf7b: I'll happily buy those off you in my shop.
